body:
## Rationale

Mikkey Dee is on the MetalForge roster (whats-in-mikkey-dees-kit profile exists) but has **zero album-specific articles**. Motorhead is one of the most iconic classic metal bands globally — enormous brand recognition and evergreen search volume.

**'Bastards' (1993)** is Mikkey Dee's debut album with Motorhead (joined January 1992 after Phil Taylor's second departure):
- Immediately recognizable lineup change — dedicated fans search for Mikkey's era specifically
- Mikkey used Tama Swingstar / later Tama Artstar kits + Paiste cymbals during this period
- Distinct from Phil Taylor's Motorhead era; era-specific gear angle is strong content
- Slug fits our pattern: bastards-drum-setup

No Motorhead album articles exist on MetalForge. This opens a classic metal cluster.

## Files to touch

- packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js — add new entry
- public/llms/articles/bastards-drum-setup.md — LLM companion file

## Slug

bastards-drum-setup

## Template shape

drummer: Mikkey Dee, drummerSlug: mikkey-dee, band: Motorhead, album: Bastards, year: 1993, genre: Heavy Metal / Hard Rock

Gear: Tama Artstar II / Swingstar (22x22 kick), Paiste Giant Beat cymbals / Paiste 2002 (transition period), Tama Iron Cobra pedals, Vic Firth 5B

FAQs: What drums did Mikkey Dee use on Bastards? / When did Mikkey Dee join Motorhead? / How did Mikkey Dee's style differ from Phil Taylor?

relatedAlbums: ['whats-in-mikkey-dees-kit']

## Quality gate

- 300+ words
- 3+ FAQ Q&A (band history + gear + technique angle)
- 3+ internal links (Mikkey profile, heavy metal genre page, gear brand page)
- JSON-LD: Article + MusicAlbum + FAQPage
- LLM companion file created

## Estimated organic uplift

- 'mikkey dee drum kit', 'motorhead drummer gear', 'mikkey dee motorhead setup' long-tail
- Classic metal / Motorhead fanbase = evergreen, not tied to algorithm cycles
- Opens band editorial cluster — Sacrifice (1995), Inferno (2004) follow-up articles possible

## Verify

1. grep 'bastards-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js returns entry
2. curl metalforge.io/articles/bastards-drum-setup shows Mikkey content in HTML
3. sitemap.xml includes bastards-drum-setup
4. JSON-LD valid
5. public/llms/articles/bastards-drum-setup.md exists

## Done

Close when article live, schema valid, in sitemap.
title: SEO: Mikkey Dee — Motorhead 'Bastards' drum setup article (1993, first album article for this roster member)
